education.description: Coursework spanning computer architecture, operating systems, signals & systems, and control systems. Active member of GDG on Campus and TMU Velocity F1Tenth RoboRacer team.

Graduated with a 96% overall average from the speacialized STEM program. Specialist High Skills Major (SHSM) in Information and Communications Technology (ICT). Honor Roll Student all 4 years. Received the Computer Engineering Award for highest overall achieved. Finance Director of the Student Council. Executive member of the Atheletic Council. Participated in varsity baseball, senior basketball, and track and field. Executive member of TSA (Tamil Students Association).

work.description: Implementing autonomous racing algorithms in ROS 2 including Pure Pursuit path following. Working within a WSL + Docker environment using the F1Tenth gym simulator.
Managing finances and budgeting for the chapter, and co-organizing the annual hackathon.
